description: Upgrade Spring Boot 3.5.0 to 4.0.4 and Java 17 to 25 with full migration

userStories.title: Upgrade Gradle wrapper to support Java 25
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Gradle updated to a version that supports Java 25 so the project builds correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Update gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties to latest Gradle version supporting Java 25

userStories.title: Upgrade Spring Boot to 4.0.4, Java to 25, and rename starters
userStories.description: As a developer, I need build.gradle.kts updated with Boot 4.0.4, Java 25 toolchain, and the new modularized starter names.
acceptanceCriteria: Spring Boot plugin version changed from 3.5.0 to 4.0.4
io.spring.dependency-management plugin updated to compatible version
flyway-core and flyway-database-postgresql replaced with spring-boot-starter-flyway
thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 replaced with Boot 4 compatible equivalent
userStories.notes: All starters renamed, dependencies resolve, main code compiles. Test compilation needs package fix (US-006).

userStories.title: Update third-party dependency versions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need third-party libraries updated to versions compatible with Boot 4 and Java 25.
acceptanceCriteria: bucket4j-core updated to Jakarta EE 11 / Servlet 6.1 compatible version
zxing (core + javase) updated if needed for Java 25
H2 test dependency updated if needed

userStories.title: Fix SecurityConfig and RateLimitConfig for Spring Security 7 and Servlet 6.1
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SecurityConfig.java and RateLimitConfig.java updated for Spring Security 7 and Servlet 6.1 API changes.
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth2 login configuration (Google + GitHub) remains functional
Rate limiting still applies to /api/* endpoints
userStories.notes: No changes needed — both configs already compatible with Security 7 and Servlet 6.1.

userStories.title: Fix Jackson 3.x compatibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need JSON serialization working with Jackson 3.x default in Boot 4.
acceptanceCriteria: No com.fasterxml.jackson imports remain in source code, or Jackson 2 compat module added
All API endpoints correctly serialize/deserialize JSON request/response
userStories.notes: No Jackson imports in source code. Boot 4.0.4 ships Jackson 2.21.x — no migration needed.

userStories.title: Update test annotations and application.yml for Boot 4
userStories.description: As a developer, I need test code and config updated to Boot 4 conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: @SpringBootTest tests using MockMvc have explicit @AutoConfigureMockMvc added
Check and update any renamed properties in application.yml (e.g., spring.jackson.* to spring.jackson.json.*)
Both main and test application.yml files updated if needed
userStories.notes: AutoConfigureMockMvc import updated, database-platform removed, no MockBean/SpyBean to migrate.

userStories.title: Final verification — build and all tests pass
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to confirm the entire upgrade is complete with no regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: ./gradlew clean build succeeds with 0 test failures
No Spring Boot 4 deprecation warnings in build output
userStories.notes: Full clean build passes. All 9 test classes pass. JaCoCo report generated.
